steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $cat1 = wp_insert_term('City Break', 'destination_category'); $cat2 = wp_insert_term('European Getaway', 'destination_category'); $cat3 = wp_insert_term('Island Paradise', 'destination_category'); $d1 = wp_insert_post(array('post_title' => 'San Francisco', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'destination')); update_post_meta($d1, 'destination_route', 'Flights from Seattle'); update_post_meta($d1, 'destination_price', '$129*'); if (!is_wp_error($cat1)) wp_set_object_terms($d1, $cat1['term_id'], 'destination_category'); $d2 = wp_insert_post(array('post_title' => 'Paris', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'destination')); update_post_meta($d2, 'destination_route', 'Partner flights from SEA'); update_post_meta($d2, 'destination_price', '$645*'); if (!is_wp_error($cat2)) wp_set_object_terms($d2, $cat2['term_id'], 'destination_category'); $d3 = wp_insert_post(array('post_title' => 'Maui', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'destination')); update_post_meta($d3, 'destination_route', 'Flights from Portland'); update_post_meta($d3, 'destination_price', '$389*'); if (!is_wp_error($cat3)) wp_set_object_terms($d3, $cat3['term_id'], 'destination_category'); ?>
